## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test or benchmark
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security or safety hardening
- [ ] Research experiment

## Testing

List the commands you ran and the result.

```bash
# example
pnpm check
```

## Safety review

Does this pull request affect any of the following?

- [ ] Shell execution, generated code, or tool permissions
- [ ] Secrets, credentials, environment variables, or deployment config
- [ ] Messaging channels, external posting, webhooks, or automation
- [ ] Local files, device APIs, native apps, or infrastructure
- [ ] Model routing, subagents, memory, approvals, or sandboxing

If any box is checked, explain the safety boundary and review path.

## Documentation

- [ ] I updated relevant docs or explained why no docs change is needed.
- [ ] I added or updated examples when behavior changed.

## Screenshots or logs

Add screenshots, traces, or logs when useful. Redact secrets and private data.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Tests, docs, or examples cover the change.
- [ ] I did not commit generated logs, local state, secrets, or machine-specific artifacts.
- [ ] I disclosed AI-assisted code generation where relevant, following `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
